name: aopab/tdd
summary: Test-Driven Development workflow enforcement. Red-Green-Refactor cycle for all feature implementations and bug fixes. Covers test naming, file organization, mock/stub guidelines, and when to use unit vs integration vs e2e tests in Deno/TypeScript. Triggers on "implement", "feature", "fix bug", "write test", "test", "TDD", "red green refactor", "failing test", "test first", "unit test", "integration test".
